notes.connections:
Keithley 0  (Power Supply)
    CH1 "VIN_4p5_to_18V" → 5.0 V, 1.0 A limit
    CH2 "CH2" → 0.0 V, 0.0 A limit
    CH3 "CH3" → 0.0 V, 0.0 A limit
Keysight EL 0  (Electronic Load)
    CH1 – CC mode, 0.1, input OFF
    CH2 – Disable mode, 0.1, input OFF
Keysight EL 1  (Electronic Load)
    CH1 – CC mode, 0.1, input OFF
    CH2 – CC mode, 0.1, input OFF
Linduino
   SCL-J4 SCL
   GND-J4 GND
   SDA-J4 SDA
notes.sources:
Keithley 0 – DUT power: VIN_4p5_to_18V @ 5.0 V
Keysight EL 0 – Electronic load
Keysight EL 1 – Electronic load
notes.monitoring:
Keithley 0 – Monitor supply currents on all active channels
Keysight EL 0 – Monitor load currents / voltages
Keysight EL 1 – Monitor load currents / voltages
Register reads: CAPABILITY(0x19), STATUS_CML(0x7E), MODEL_ID(0xD0), CTRL123(0xD1),
  VID_GO(0xD2), CTRL_MODE1(0xD3), CTRL_MODE2(0xD4), DLY1(0xD5), DLY2(0xD6), DLY3(0xD7),
  VID1(0xD8), VID2(0xD9), VID3(0xDA), DVS_CFG(0xDB), DVS_LIM1(0xDC), DVS_LIM2(0xDD),
  DVS_LIM3(0xDE), FT_CFG(0xDF), PG_CFG(0xE0), PG_READ(0xE1), STATUS_LCH(0xE2)
notes.general:
Config: ADP5055
PMBus I2C address: 0x70 (ADDR=GND) | 0x72 (ADDR=VDDIO) | 0x74 (ADDR=Float)
Register recording via ACE – press Record in Setup_GUI to log all registers to Excel
BRD 3 Struggles with 3 outputs
